definition:
1. to set against, oppose , with dative, (Simonides Lyricus): to contrast, compare , τί τινι (Herdotus Historicus); also τί τινος, (Thucydides); τι πρός τι (Demosthenes Orator) 
2. ἀντ. τινά τινι to match  one against  the other in battle , Lat. committere, ἴσους ἴσοισι ἀντιθείς (Euripides):—;Pass. to be matched  one against  another, (Herdotus Historicus) 
3. to retort, rejoin , (Euripides) 
4. to deposit in return , (Euripides):—; to give in return  or as a recompense , τί τινος one thing for  another, (Euripides) (ML)
